overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open grassland. The character passes a horse-drawn carriage and later a lone rider while traversing rolling hills with expansive views of the surrounding prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through grassy hills with scattered tree cover

events.description: horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the dirt path, emerging from beneath a large tree into open grassland

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the path, passing the character on the right

entered.detail: mature tree with spreading branches providing partial shade over the path at the start
worn dirt path cutting through the grassy terrain
grass-covered hills rising in the distance under a blue sky
tall metal tower emitting dark smoke visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under the partial shade of a large tree as the character walks along a dirt trail. A horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by on the right. The environment is open grassland with rolling hills and a distant industrial smoke tower visible against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland prairie with dirt trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt trail through open grassland, approaching the area near the smoke tower

entered.detail: cluster of large gray boulders on the right side of the trail
single leafless tree standing on the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The character walks through wide-open grassland along the dirt trail. The large tree from the start falls behind, while a rock formation appears on the right and a lone dead tree becomes visible ahead. The smoke tower remains visible ahead, gradually moving from right to center in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant valley vista

events.description: lone horse rider approaches from ahead and passes by on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail as the landscape opens to reveal a distant valley, observing a passing rider

notable_agents.action: lone rider on horseback traveling along the path, passing the character on the right

entered.detail: expansive view of a wide valley with scattered vegetation and distant terrain features

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the terrain opens to reveal a sweeping vista of a distant valley. A lone horse rider approaches and passes by on the right. The smoke tower and rock formation fall behind, while the dead tree shifts to the right side of the frame against the expansive landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from a shaded woodland edge into a sweeping, open prairie vista. It begins under the partial shade of a large tree as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, with a distant industrial smoke tower punctuating the blue horizon. As the character moves forward, the tree falls behind and the landscape opens into wide grassland, where a rock formation appears to the right and a lone dead tree emerges ahead. The scene then expands to reveal a sweeping vista of a distant valley as a lone horse rider passes by, while the smoke tower and rock formation recede into the distance. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory, leaving the dead tree to the side against the backdrop of the expansive, rolling hills.
